description: CTAI style reference manifest — Catherine's approved reference images for TruRender IP-Adapter style guidance

refs.notes: New England Home cover shot. Arched steel doors, brick herringbone floor, arched glazing, rustic-luxury. Highest priority for any interior render.
Poolhouse entry/threshold. Plaster walls, brick floor, arched steel door, soft garden view. Strong indoor-outdoor connection.
Poolhouse arched door with twilight pool/sky view. Serene, symmetrical, view-framing composition.
Powder room. Deep green, cream plaster, walnut vanity, brass fixtures, dark stone counter, brick floor. Best bath reference.
Exterior with snow, aged wood siding, stone chimney, warm window glow. Cinematic and atmospheric. Use for exterior renders.
Bright barn interior dining/living. White walls, pale wood, black steel windows, green landscape view. Clean and airy.
Sage green cabinetry, white marble slab, brass hardware, walnut island, black metal windows. Graphic, material-rich kitchen.
Walnut cabinetry, white counters, stainless appliances. Clean straight-on architectural kitchen composition.
Wide editorial interior — expansive, balanced, relaxed luxury. Kitchen/living open plan.
Urban loft — exposed wood beams, white brick, stainless steel, cognac leather, polished wood floor. Modern-industrial warmth.
White painted brick, exposed wood beams, black stone counters, wood floors. Wide rustic-modern kitchen/dining.
Grand residential great room — wide plank floors, exposed beams, painted paneling, fireplace, metal lanterns.
Pale oak cabinetry, white marble, champagne metal pulls, black windows. Minimal luxury kitchen, quiet and precise.
Stair/entry detail. White walls, pale oak treads, black metal supports. Minimal, sculptural, craft-focused.
Contemporary office/living. White, pale gray, warm wood, dramatic sun patch. Geometric and restrained.
Bright modern dining/kitchen. White cabinetry, wood floors, black-framed glazing. Clean, airy, approachable.

usage.description: At render time, filter refs by space_type tag. Multiply each ref's base weight by the tag_weights multiplier for the target space type. Sort descending, take top N (recommended: 4-6 for IP-Adapter). Normalize weights to sum to 1.0.
usage.example: For a kitchen render: Charlestown (0.9), Newton Kitchen (0.85), Locke (0.85*0.4=0.34 as living), Modern Loft (0.8*0.4=0.32), Poolhouse9 (1.0*0.4=0.40 as living) — take top 4-6 by computed score.
